calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-12-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Petitioner: Rebecca Hinojosa, present in pro, was sworn and examined.
Matter continued form 11-30-06 for Proof of Publication.
Proof of Publication submitted in court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Buster George Hinojosa and further orders the gender changed from Female to Male.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-30-2006 Reset To Dec-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Petitioner: Rebecca Hinojosa, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Lacks proof of publication, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Dec.12, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
